nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 菲律宾
nodes.summary: 菲律宾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联131种鸟类，包括细斑树鸭、青头潜鸭、菲律宾冢雉等131种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 民都洛
nodes.summary: 民都洛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Mindoro scops owl、凤头鹰雕、Mindoro hornbill等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 非法猎捕
nodes.summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

nodes.name: Mindoro hornbill
nodes.summary: Mindoro hornbill（Mindoro hornbill，学名 Penelopides mindorensis），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要分布于民都洛、菲律宾、加萊拉港，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、非法猎捕、猎捕压力。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 加萊拉港
nodes.summary: 加萊拉港是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Mindoro hornbill、Mindoro cuckooshrike，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is endemic to forests on Mindoro in the Philippines found in tropical moist lowland forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is endemic to forests on Mindoro in the Philippines found in tropical moist lowland forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Conservation actions proposed include more surveys in areas where they have been reported to better understand the population, create formal protection in other sites where they are found in Malpalon, Puerto Galera and Manamlay Lake

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss, and is consequently considered endangered by the IUCN

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Hunting and poaching are also considered as significant threats

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Hunting and poaching are also considered as significant threats
